steps.title: Find the middle position
steps.content: The data are already in increasing order and there are $9$ values. With an odd number of values, the median is the middle value, at position $$\frac{9+1}{2}=5.$$

steps.title: Read the fifth value
steps.content: Counting through the sorted list, the fifth value is $70$: $$62,64,65,67,\mathbf{70},72,76,78,83.$$
